description: Added early subsection making explicit that AASC is the systematic consequence layer of kernel-neutral evaluability necessities rather than an optional framework.
Added explicit statement that denying adequacy conditions changes the target rather than supplying a same-domain counterexample.
Added remark after target-adequacy lemma stating kernel terms name roles already forced by adequacy conditions.
Reframed endpoint method so branch exclusion is supplied by necessity constraints and AASC records fixed-domain consequences.
Added optional-overlay misframing as a denial target that must be converted into a kernel adequacy or consequence-theorem failure.
Swept the manuscript to preserve AASC-owned necessity framing and remove optional-framework language from theorem-facing exposition.
